# attributes()

**Instance Method**

Returns a dictionary of the style attributes used for the candidates window..

## Declaration

```swift
func attributes() -> [AnyHashable : Any]!
```

## Return Value

The dictionary that contains the keys and values for the styles.

## Managing Window Type and Text Attributes

- **panelType()**: Returns the style of the candidates window.
- **setPanelType(_:)**: Sets the style of the candidates window.
- **setAttributes(_:)**: Sets the style attributes for the candidates window.
